name: hope-agent
description: 会记忆、能成长的随身 AI 助手 · 桌面 / 云端 / IM 随叫随到，手机远程也能连 | Personal AI that remembers and grows — lives on desktop, self-hosted server and every IM, reachable anywhere
summaryZh: 会记忆、能成长的随身 AI 助手 · 桌面 / 云端 / IM 随叫随到，手机远程也能连 | Personal AI that remembers and grows — lives on desktop, self-hosted server and every IM, reachable anywhere 这类项目更偏执行与编排，适合搭自动化工作流或多代理系统。
